title: UPI OC No 223 FY 2025 26 Enhancement of UPI Autopay

NPCI/UPI/OC-223/2025-26 7" October 2025
To,
Members - Unified Payments Interface (UPI)

Dear Sir/Madam,
Subject: Enhancement of UPI Autopay

To provide flexibility for users and merchants, enhancement in the existing UPI Autopay framework has been
introduced. The enhanced framework shall allow users to view all their active UP! autopay mandates in any
app of their choice. Users shall also have an option to port mandates from one UPI App to another. It shall
also allow merchants to port and execute UPI autopay mandates through their preferred Payee PSP as
deemed fit.

In addition to extant guidelines, members are required to adhere with the following requirements:

1. Payer PSP banks/ UPI apps:

i, Payer PSPs and UPI apps shall ensure complete lifecycle management, including viewing and
porting of user’s UP! Autopay mandates on the respective app only under the ‘Manage Bank
accounts’ or the dedicated ‘UP! Autopay’ section. This will be in addition to existing operations
like revoke, pause, modify etc.

ii, All payer-initiated UPI Autopay operations, as per existing guidelines, shall require UP! PIN.

iii. | The ‘Port Mandate’ shall be strictly user-driven only from the mandate details page fetched with
‘View Mandate’. No inducements, including cashback, incentives, in-app notifications, banners,
nudges, alerts, any app based/non-app-based implementation eic., shall be employed to solicit
mandate portability.

iv. Payer PSPs and their UP! Apps shall not utilize mandate details obtained through the ‘view
mandate’ for any other purpose.

v. ‘Port Mandate’ can be done only once in a rolling 90-day period.

2. Payee PSPs:

i, Payee PSP shall generate a unique Merchant Identifier Code (MIC) for every merchant in a
standardized manner. This MIC shall be a mandatory parameter for all UP! Autopay mandates
with purpose code ‘AZ’.

ii, | Merchants can choose to execute UPI Autopay mandates through any UPI ID provided the
appropriate MIC and other mandaie details are passed.

ii. | Merchants shall be able to update their existing UP! ID without alteration of the MIC and other
mandate parameters.

iv. Payee UPI ID updation for active UP! Autopay mandate shall be allowed only in scenarios arising
out of regulatory direction or discontinuation of services by Payee PSP.

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

All existing mandates will continue to work as per the existing framework during the transition.

The updated framework applies to both new and existing mandates and remains subject to all Regulatory
and NPC! guidelines for e-mandates and UPI Autopay.

Members live on UPI Autopay feature to enable the revised framework by 315‘ December 2025.

Your Sincerely,

SD/-
Sourabh Tomar
Head UPI Product
